reviews.review_title: Potential to be one of the best if
reviews.review_description: The developers of this game keep going take out the bugginess allow the game to be more smoother and turning and handling this could be one of the greats like death race the movie or full auto in VR there is a game already out death lap that reminds me of this game but that game is so good I wish this game hadn't feel and smoothness and handling like that one which I know it has the potential to become if not greater than deathlap if the developers keep going and put more time into perfecting this game it will be unstoppable extra cars just came out with a battle mode it is amazing but it doesn't have consistent guns on the cars def lap does I heard the developers of this VR game to keep on working on it and I will tell everyone to purchase it everyone I know show more love continue more attention and love into this game five stars for me I will give you a 10 if I could and I will give you another five once there's updates and fixing some of the buggy issues great job fellas keep loving the game

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your detailed and thoughtful review! We truly appreciate your support and encouragement. Your feedback is incredibly valuable to us. We're thrilled to hear you see the potential for this game to reach new heights and become one of the greats.

Our game is still in early access, and we’re actively working on updates to address issues and further enhance the game’s smoothness and mechanics. Your excitement about the new battle mode and extra cars motivates us to continue refining and perfecting the experience. We’re committed to making this game as immersive and enjoyable as possible. Thank you for your kind words and stay tuned for updates, and we can’t wait to hear your thoughts on the improvements!
